2606.13125.title: Select and Improve: Understanding the Mechanics of Post-Training for Reasoning
2606.13125.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning has rapidly emerged as a key component in the training of reasoning and coding models, yet it remains poorly understood from a mechanistic perspective. We study how and through what underlying processes capabilities are acquired or enhanced via reinforcement learning post-training. Our analysis, based on controlled math reasoning experiments with Qwen-2.5-1.5B, reveals two core mechanisms: strategy selection and strategy improvement. Our results highlight the role of SFT data and reinforcement learning data in activating these mechanisms, in particular showing how supervising the model on diverse reasoning strategies can enable strategy selection and how increasing difficulty in reinforcement learning data can enable strategy improvement. Taken together, our results provide mechanistic insight into RL training and suggest practical interventions to continue scaling reasoning capabilities.
2606.13125.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習迅速成為推理和編碼模型訓練中的關鍵組成部分，但從機制的角度來看，它仍然不太被理解。<lb/>我們研究了能力是如何以及通過什麼潛在過程在強化學習後訓練中獲得或增強的。<lb/>我們的分析基於對 Qwen-2.5-1.5B 的控制數學推理實驗，揭示了兩個核心機制：策略選擇和策略改進。<lb/>我們的結果突顯了 SFT 數據和強化學習數據在啟動這些機制中的作用，特別顯示了如何通過對模型進行多樣化推理策略的監督來促進策略選擇，以及如何通過增加強化學習數據的難度來促進策略改進。<lb/>綜合來看，我們的結果提供了對強化學習訓練的機制性洞察，並建議了持續擴展推理能力的實際干預措施。
2606.13125.author: Akshay Krishnamurthy et.al.
2606.13125.authors: Akshay Krishnamurthy, Audrey Huang, Nived Rajaraman
